task: get_auth_from_url in utils.py relies on catching AttributeError/TypeError to handle URLs without credentials. Refactor it to handle the missing-credential case directly.
correctness_argument: The None-handling is done inline with `or ''`, eliminating the try/except, while `unquote()` is kept on both fields. Percent-encoded credentials (e.g. `user%40example.com`) are decoded correctly, preserving the original function's behaviour for all inputs.
